name: FlexRayRcvV6Frame
title: FlexRayRcvV6Frame
syntax: FlexRayRcvV6Frame( long msgTime, word channel, word frameID, byte cycle, byte len, byte data[], int sync, int NMIndication, int ReservedFlag, word headerCRC, word status, int rcv )
description: A function defined in CAPL with this signature receives all FlexRay frames.

parameters.name: msgTime
parameters.description: Time stamp of the FlexRay frame.
